description.description: Specifies the requirements for the payment instrument that need to be included in the request for a particular route.

issuingCountryCode.description: The two-character [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2) country code where the payment instrument is issued. For example, **NL** or **US**.

onlyForCrossBalancePlatform.description: Specifies if the requirement only applies to transfers to another balance platform.

paymentInstrumentType.description: The type of the payment instrument. For example, "BankAccount" or "Card".
